name: Potatoes Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add onions, celery, carrot, and seasonings. Cook for 7 minutes until vegetables are tender.
4. In an 8 x 12 inch baking dish, alternate layers of gravy, potatoes, and sauteed vegetables. Repeat.
5. Top with the remaining gravy. Sprinkle paprika and nutritional yeast on top.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
